overview: Group photo voting app where creators upload photos of up to 4 people, and the public votes on who wins each poll category. Features an Instagram reels-style swipe feed, live vote results, and a creator dashboard.
features: Group photo upload with manual face numbering (1-4)
Poll creation with categories like Most Handsome, Best Style, Most Photogenic
Live vote results with percentages and rankings
Creator dashboard showing poll stats and winners
One vote per poll per user enforcement
